home.title: Nihongo Manabi 🌸
home.subtitle: What do you want to learn today?
home.tourHomeDesc:
See today's learning stats and streak here.
Study every day to build your 🔥 streak!
home.tourVocabDesc:
Go to Vocab, pick a topic,
flip cards to learn Japanese,
SRS schedules your next review automatically.
275+ words from N5 to N2!
home.tourKanaDesc:
Go to Kana for multiple choice quizzes.
Covers both hiragana and katakana,
with extra focus on easily confused characters.
home.tourJlptDesc:
Go to JLPT to try N5, N4, N3 mock exams!
Random vocab + grammar questions each time.
Review wrong answers and keep a history.
home.tourDailyDesc:
Aim for 5-10 new words a day
+ one round of kana practice
+ one JLPT mock exam.
Keeping your streak is the fastest way to improve!

vocab.title: Vocabulary
vocab.subtitle: Learned {{learned}} / {{total}} words
vocab.reviewBanner: 🔔 {{count}} words due for review → Review Now

kana.title: Kana Practice
kana.practiceConfusableSubHiragana: Focus on ぬ/め/ね, は/ほ and more
kana.practiceConfusableSubKatakana: Focus on シ/ツ, ソ/ン and more
kana.tipHiragana1: · Start with あいうえお, the most basic kana
kana.tipHiragana2: · ぬ (nu) closes on the right, ね (ne) opens on the right
kana.tipHiragana3: · は (ha) has two strokes on the right, ほ (ho) has three
kana.tipKatakana1: · シ (shi) strokes are horizontal, ツ (tsu) strokes are vertical
kana.tipKatakana2: · ソ (so) slants right, ン (n) slants left
kana.tipKatakana3: · Learn hiragana first — katakana shares the same sounds
kana.questionHint: What is the reading of this kana?

phrases.title: Common Phrases
phrases.subtitle: Practical Japanese for travel and daily life
phrases.tip1: · 〜 marks parts you can swap out
phrases.tip2: · すみません can get a server's attention or start a conversation
phrases.tip3: · ありがとうございます is more polite than ありがとう
phrases.quizHint: What does this Japanese sentence mean?
phrases.resultMsgLow: Browse the phrases more and try again!

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your Japanese learning journey
progress.resetMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all learning records?

grammar.title: Grammar Practice
grammar.subtitle: Multiple choice quiz with detailed explanations
grammar.menuN5Sub: は / が / を / に / で, {{count}} questions
grammar.menuN3Sub: 〜によって / 〜として / 〜にとって, {{count}} questions
grammar.resultMsgLow: Review the grammar explanations and try again!

jlpt.title: JLPT Mock Exam
jlpt.subtitle: Vocab (meaning · reading · reverse) + grammar mixed
jlpt.infoReading: · Reading: see kanji → choose hiragana reading
jlpt.infoReverse: · Japanese: see Chinese → choose Japanese word
jlpt.infoGrammar: · Grammar: fill in the correct particle or pattern
jlpt.infoPassNote: Questions are randomized each time. 60%+ is a pass.
jlpt.clearMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all exam records?
jlpt.readingPrompt: How do you read this word?

kanji.title: Kanji Practice
kanji.subtitle: Train kanji reading and recognition
kanji.questionHintKanjiToReading: How do you read this kanji?
kanji.resultMsgLow: Review the kanji more and try again!

aiChat.title: AI Conversation
aiChat.subtitle: Pick a scene and chat in Japanese with AI
aiChat.sceneRestaurantDesc: Order food, ask about the menu, pay
aiChat.sceneFreeChatDesc: Casual chat with a Japanese friend
aiChat.tip1: · Type in Japanese and AI will respond and correct mistakes
aiChat.tip2: · Tap hints to auto-fill suggested replies
aiChat.apiError: Connection failed. Please try again later.
aiChat.limitReached: 🌙 Daily limit reached. Come back tomorrow!
aiChat.limitMessage: You can practice {{limit}} AI chats per day. See you tomorrow!

onboarding.welcomeDesc:
Designed for everyone learning Japanese.
From kana to daily vocabulary,
memorize efficiently with science-backed methods.
onboarding.levelDesc:
Choose the level that fits you best.
The app will recommend the right learning path.
onboarding.levelBeginnerDesc:
Just starting out with Japanese.
Begin with hiragana, katakana, and basic vocab.
onboarding.levelN5Desc:
Familiar with basic kana.
Want to strengthen daily vocab and phrases.
onboarding.levelN4Desc:
Have N5 level knowledge.
Goal is to pass the JLPT N4 exam.
onboarding.featuresDesc:
Three core features to help you build
a systematic learning habit.
onboarding.featureVocabDesc:
175 categorized words, learn by flipping cards.
Rate yourself: Don't Know / Remember / Easy.
SRS algorithm schedules your reviews automatically.
onboarding.featureKanaDesc:
Multiple choice quiz for all 46 katakana.
Special focus on シ/ツ, ソ/ン
and other easily confused characters.
onboarding.featurePhrasesDesc:
18 everyday scenarios: shopping, restaurants, transit.
Sentences you can use immediately when traveling.
onboarding.readyDesc:
Aim for 10-15 minutes of study every day.
Keep your daily streak going 🔥
Goal: pass JLPT N3/N2!
onboarding.tip3: · Prioritize due reviews when they appear
